name: pi-model-profiles
description: Pi extension for saving, importing, and applying agent model frontmatter profiles.

scripts.test: npx --yes -p typescript@5.9.2 tsc --strict --skipLibCheck --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target ES2022 --outDir .test-dist src/types-shims.d.ts src/errors.ts src/types.ts src/constants.ts src/atomic-write.ts src/profile-fields.ts src/frontmatter-parser.ts src/profile-store.ts src/agent-writer.ts src/import-service.ts test/frontmatter-parser.test.ts test/import-service.test.ts test/agent-writer.test.ts test/profile-store.test.ts && node --test .test-dist/test/frontmatter-parser.test.js .test-dist/test/import-service.test.js .test-dist/test/agent-writer.test.js .test-dist/test/profile-store.test.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test

author: MasuRii
